description: A fan arrives at their seat to find that it is broken. An agent must relocate them.

nodes.task_description: Receive a report from an usher about a broken seat, including the seat location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the details of the issue.

nodes.task_description: Find the best available comparable seats to relocate the fan to.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds two empty seats in a nearby section.

nodes.task_description: Reissue the fan's ticket for the new seat location and dispatch an usher to guide them.
Create a work order for the maintenance team to repair the broken seat after the game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the issue for the facility team.
